title: pentacalia hillii
intro: Pentacalia hillii, also known as Hill's pentacalia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is native to Ecuador and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its health benefits of reducing pain and inflammation. Herbal preparations of Pentacalia hillii include infusions, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used to treat a range of health issues and promote overall well-being.
